## Install / Upgrade

```bash
brew upgrade coding-brain                 # Homebrew
cargo install coding-brain                # crates.io
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aleadag/codexctl/main/install.sh | sh
coding-brain init
coding-brain doctor
# Restart Codex after reviewing the new managed hooks.
```
